Name: UMovementComponent
Description:
MovementComponent is an abstract component class that defines functionality for moving a PrimitiveComponent (our UpdatedComponent) each tick.
  Base functionality includes:
     - Restricting movement to a plane or axis.
     - Utility functions for special handling of collision results (SlideAlongSurface(), ComputeSlideVector(), TwoWallAdjust()).
     - Utility functions for moving when there may be initial penetration (SafeMoveUpdatedComponent(), ResolvePenetration()).
     - Automatically registering the component tick and finding a component to move on the owning Actor.
  Normally the root component of the owning actor is moved, however another component may be selected (see SetUpdatedComponent()).
  During swept (non-teleporting) movement only collision of UpdatedComponent is considered, attached components will teleport to the end location ignoring collision.

Variables.Name: UpdatedComponent
UpdatedPrimitive
Variables.Description: UpdatedComponent, cast as a UPrimitiveComponent. May be invalid if UpdatedComponent was null or not a UPrimitiveComponent.

Variables.Name: PlaneConstraintNormal
Variables.Description:
The normal or axis of the plane that constrains movement, if bConstrainToPlane is enabled.
	  If for example you wanted to constrain movement to the X-Z plane (so that Y cannot change), the normal would be set to X=0 Y=1 Z=0.
	  This is recalculated whenever PlaneConstraintAxisSetting changes. It is normalized once the component is registered with the game world.
	  @see bConstrainToPlane, SetPlaneConstraintNormal(), SetPlaneConstraintFromVectors()

Variables.Name: PlaneConstraintOrigin
bUpdateOnlyIfRendered
Variables.Description: If true, skips TickComponent() if UpdatedComponent was not recently rendered.

Variables.Name: bAutoUpdateTickRegistration
Variables.Description:
If true, whenever the updated component is changed, this component will enable or disable its tick dependent on whether it has something to update.
	  This will NOT enable tick at startup if bAutoActivate is false, because presumably you have a good reason for not wanting it to start ticking initially.

Variables.Name: bTickBeforeOwner
Variables.Description:
If true, after registration we will add a tick dependency to tick before our owner (if we can both tick).
	  This is important when our tick causes an update in the owner's position, so that when the owner ticks it uses the most recent position without lag.
	  Disabling this can improve performance if both objects tick but the order of ticks doesn't matter.

Variables.Name: bAutoRegisterUpdatedComponent
Variables.Description: If true, registers the owner's Root component as the UpdatedComponent if there is not one currently assigned.

Variables.Name: bConstrainToPlane
Variables.Description:
If true, movement will be constrained to a plane.
	  @see PlaneConstraintNormal, PlaneConstraintOrigin, PlaneConstraintAxisSetting

Variables.Name: bSnapToPlaneAtStart
Variables.Description: If true and plane constraints are enabled, then the updated component will be snapped to the plane when first attached.

Variables.Name: bAutoRegisterPhysicsVolumeUpdates
Variables.Description:
If true, then applies the value of bComponentShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume to the UpdatedComponent. If false, will not change bShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume on the UpdatedComponent at all.
	  @see bComponentShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume

Variables.Name: bComponentShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume
Variables.Description:
If true, enables bShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume on the UpdatedComponent during initialization from SetUpdatedComponent(), otherwise disables such updates.
	  Only enabled if bAutoRegisterPhysicsVolumeUpdates is true.
	  WARNING: UpdatePhysicsVolume is potentially expensive if overlap events are also disabled because it requires a separate query against all physics volumes in the world.

Variables.Name: PlaneConstraintAxisSetting

Functions.Name: GetGravityZ
Functions.Description: Returns gravity that affects this component

Functions.Name: GetMaxSpeed
Functions.Description: Returns maximum speed of component in current movement mode.

Functions.Name: K2_GetMaxSpeedModifier
Functions.Description: Returns a scalar applied to the maximum velocity that the component can currently move.

Functions.Name: K2_GetModifiedMaxSpeed
Functions.Description: Returns the result of GetMaxSpeed()  GetMaxSpeedModifier().

Functions.Name: IsExceedingMaxSpeed
Functions.Description:
Returns true if the current velocity is exceeding the given max speed (usually the result of GetMaxSpeed()), within a small error tolerance.
	  Note that under normal circumstances updates cause by acceleration will not cause this to be true, however external forces or changes in the max speed limit
	  can cause the max speed to be violated.

Functions.Name: StopMovementImmediately
Functions.Description: Stops movement immediately (zeroes velocity, usually zeros acceleration for components with acceleration).

Functions.Name: GetPhysicsVolume
Functions.Description: Returns the PhysicsVolume this MovementComponent is using, or the world's default physics volume if none.

Functions.Name: PhysicsVolumeChanged
Functions.Description: Delegate when PhysicsVolume of UpdatedComponent has been changed

Functions.Name: SetUpdatedComponent
Functions.Description: Assign the component we move and update.

Functions.Name: K2_MoveUpdatedComponent
Functions.Description:
Moves our UpdatedComponent by the given Delta, and sets rotation to NewRotation.
	  Respects the plane constraint, if enabled.

Return.Description: True if some movement occurred, false if no movement occurred. Result of any impact will be stored in OutHit.

Functions.Name: SetPlaneConstraintAxisSetting
Functions.Description:
Set the plane constraint axis setting.
	  Changing this setting will modify the current value of PlaneConstraintNormal.

Functions.Name: GetPlaneConstraintAxisSetting
Functions.Description: Get the plane constraint axis setting.

Functions.Name: SetPlaneConstraintNormal
Functions.Description:
Sets the normal of the plane that constrains movement, enforced if the plane constraint is enabled.
	  Changing the normal automatically sets PlaneConstraintAxisSetting to "Custom".

Params.Name: PlaneNormal
Params.Description: The normal of the plane. If non-zero in length, it will be normalized.

Functions.Name: SetPlaneConstraintFromVectors
Functions.Description: Uses the Forward and Up vectors to compute the plane that constrains movement, enforced if the plane constraint is enabled.

Functions.Name: SetPlaneConstraintOrigin
Functions.Description: Sets the origin of the plane that constrains movement, enforced if the plane constraint is enabled.

Functions.Name: SetPlaneConstraintEnabled
Functions.Description: Sets whether or not the plane constraint is enabled.

Functions.Name: GetPlaneConstraintNormal
Functions.Description: Returns the normal of the plane that constrains movement, enforced if the plane constraint is enabled.

Functions.Name: GetPlaneConstraintOrigin
Functions.Description: Get the plane constraint origin. This defines the behavior of snapping a position to the plane, such as by SnapUpdatedComponentToPlane().

Return.Description: The origin of the plane that constrains movement, if the plane constraint is enabled.

Functions.Name: ConstrainDirectionToPlane
Functions.Description: Constrain a direction vector to the plane constraint, if enabled.

Functions.Name: ConstrainLocationToPlane
Functions.Description: Constrain a position vector to the plane constraint, if enabled.

Functions.Name: ConstrainNormalToPlane
Functions.Description: Constrain a normal vector (of unit length) to the plane constraint, if enabled.

Functions.Name: SnapUpdatedComponentToPlane
Functions.Description: Snap the updated component to the plane constraint, if enabled.
